name: lovelcp--catchclaw
description: A fun utility skill that generates catchy, claw-themed puns, slogans, and one-liners. Use this skill when the user asks for puns, wordplay, slogans, or creative one-liners related to claws, cats, crabs, lobsters, or grabbing/catching themes. Also triggers when users want fun team names, project codenames, or playful taglines with a "claw" or "catch" vibe.
